text: The robotic system zooms out, and all three arms make a coordinated global movement towards the blue panel located on the screen's left side.
The surgeon adjusts the left and right outer robotic arms to grasp the door handles, demonstrating precise control of the robotic instruments.
The operator attempts to place a blue shape into its designated receptacle, encountering difficulty due to suboptimal grip from the previous panel.
The surgeon demonstrates grabbing the shapes in a vertical orientation, focusing on holding them at the edge of the stem for optimal placement.
The orange shape is placed into the orange receptacle, demonstrating a smooth insertion process.
The surgeon receives a warning sign indicating the right arm is moving out of view, prompting a quick camera adjustment to maintain visibility of all instruments.
The surgeon makes multiple camera adjustments and clutches, swapping the robotic arms to reposition before attempting to open the green panel.
